ValidationRule.description: Ensures that the correct Status - Water is used at the appropriate Lead Qualification Stages.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( $User.Id!="0053A00000DPNX3", OR ( ISCHANGED(Status_Water__c) && ISPICKVAL(Status_Water__c, "Open"), NOT ( OR ( ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "Turnback"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "") ) ) && ISCHANGED(Status_Water__c) && CONTAINS(TEXT(Status_Water__c), "Turnback"), NOT ( OR ( ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "Qualified Lead - Warm"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "Qualified Lead - Hot"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "Rejected"), ISPICKVAL(LQS_Water__c, "") ) ) && ISCHANGED(Status_Water__c) && CONTAINS(TEXT(Status_Water__c), "Reject") ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CONTACTS_020: The Status - Water field cannot be updated to this value at the current LQS - Water.
